holdings.infoBox: QQXT is an equity ETF with a total of 59 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cisco Systems stock at 2.69%, Old Dominion Freight Line at 2.25%, Monster Beverage at 2.20%, Marriott International at 2.18%, and CSX Corporation at 2.16%.

overview.description: The First Trust Nasdaq-100 Ex-Technology Sector Index Fund (QQXT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ-100 Ex-Tech Sector index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of NASDAQ 100 stocks that excludes technology companies. QQXT was launched on Feb 8, 2007 and is issued by First Trust.
